texto: There’s no question about freedom of speech when everyone thinks exactly the same and no one says anything out of the accepted norms. In this kind of climate, even the mildest questions sound like heresy, and the outcome is intolerance of other people’s beliefs, ideas, actions and freedoms.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Keith Harmon: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “There’s no question about freedom of speech when everyone thinks exactly the same and no one says…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, liberty, there pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.

frase_original: There’s no question about freedom of speech when everyone thinks exactly the same and no one says anything out of the accepted norms. In this kind of climate, even the mildest questions sound like heresy, and the outcome is intolerance of other people’s beliefs, ideas, actions and freedoms.
